---
title: "Max"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-27"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Setup

```{r}

library(terra)
library(data.table)

r_tmp  <- rast("us_temp.nc", subds = "tmp")
r_d2c <- rast("us_temp.nc", subds = "distance_to_coast")

```



```{r}
install.packages("geodata")
install.packages("ncdf4")

library(ncdf4)
library(terra)
library(geodata)

# add elevation data
elev <- elevation_30s(country = "USA", path = "data/")
plot(elev)

elev_05deg <- resample(elev, r_tmp[[1]], method = "average")
plot(elev_05deg)

# combine layers of data
r_all <- c(r_tmp, elev_05deg, r_d2c)
names(r_all) <- c(names(r_tmp), "elev", "dist_to_coast")

writeCDF(r_all, "ds_usa.nc", overwrite=TRUE)
```
